description_long: This bungalow complex consists of several single-story residential buildings arranged on a rectangular plot, each with a low-pitched roof and wide eaves. The structures feature large, regularly spaced windows and prominent front porches, providing a welcoming and open appearance. The roofs are gabled, and the facades are simple, with minimal ornamentation, reflecting a practical and functional design. The buildings are separated by paved walkways and small landscaped areas, suggesting a suburban or neighborhood setting. The exterior surfaces appear to be finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted wood, with some darker accents on the roofs and porches. The overall layout is open and accessible, with clear entryways and pathways connecting the different units.
description: A group of single-story bungalows with gabled roofs, large windows, and front porches, arranged on a rectangular plot with walkways and landscaping.
description_view_0: This view shows the front and side facades of the bungalows, highlighting the porches, gabled roofs, and the open layout of the complex.
description_view_1: From this angle, the alignment of the buildings along the main walkway is visible, as well as the separation between units and the entry points.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the rear and side aspects of the bungalows, showing the backyards and the overall depth of the plot.
description_view_3: Here, the front porches and main entrances are most prominent, with the walkways leading directly to each unit.
